programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash hopes to guide a fiery Ponyta to win an annual Pokémon race.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter a young boy living with a group of wild Kangaskhan.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends run into troublemakers while riding bicycles over a long bridge.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Ditto hasn't quite mastered its transformations.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash convinces himself that Pikachu should be released back into the wild.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a boy being pressured by his brothers to evolve his Eevee.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends try everything they can think of to wake up a wild Snorlax.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes visit a city where two unsanctioned Gyms compete for official status.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.sub-title: The March Of The Exeggutor Squad
programme.desc: Our heroes help out a struggling magician, but his decisions lead to danger.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash agrees to battle a cowardly Paras whose Trainer wants it to evolve.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Jigglypuff who gets mad when its song puts listeners to sleep.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash decides to join in a fossil excavation as a chance to beat Gary.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: The Pokémon Center is full, so our heroes help treat Pokémon at a hospital.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: James confronts his past upon returning to his family's mansion.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter a boy who works with his Farfetch'd to steal Pokémon.

programme.title: BAM!
programme.desc: The lives of gig economy workers intersect as they try to make ends meet in Chicago. A non binary bike messenger delivers sexy toys, two sisters deliver art, and two roommates sell drugs for their friend while he's on vacation.

programme.title: 21 and Over
programme.desc: The night before his big medical school interview, a promising student celebrates his 21st birthday with his two best friends.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: In this outrageous spoof of "found footage" movies, young couple Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) and Kisha (Essence Atkins) have just moved into their dream house. As they settle in, they quickly find they're not alone. But it's not the house that's haunted, it's Malcolm's girlfriend!

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Everything is running smoothly for popular radio DJ Dr. Emma Lloyd in the run up to her own wedding when she makes the shocking discovery: she's already married – and to someone else!

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Self-centered Solomon Lynch takes a journey through his past, present, and future. But it takes more than Christmas spirit to set things right in this story of hope, faith, and redemption.

programme.title: The Christmas Sitters
programme.desc: When holiday flight delays strand two parents, they double-book clashing babysitters: mom's uptight lawyer friend Nora and dad's laid-back musician brother Max. Sparks fly as chaos turns to chemistry—could a Christmas miracle be in the air?

programme.title: The Key to Christmas
programme.desc: When a disgruntled Head Elf is kicked off the toy-making team by Santa Claus, she decides to get revenge by taking over the North Pole, capturing Mrs. Claus, and turning back time to “De-Santa-ize” Santa—making him younger and younger every minute!

programme.title: My Christmas Fiancé
programme.desc: A part-time student at a resort restaurant in beautiful Italy is hired by her boss to pose as his fiancée for the holidays, so he can avoid getting married.

programme.title: Frozen Christmas 3
programme.desc: A Frozen Christmas 3 is the ultimate festive film for all the family.

programme.title: Cut Bank
programme.desc: (2014) Moody crime thriller with Liam Hemsworth, John Malkovich and Billy Bob Thornton. Could capturing a crime on camera be a couple's ticket out of Cut Bank? Escaping a small town can be murder...

programme.title: Cut Bank
programme.desc: (2014) Moody crime thriller with Liam Hemsworth, John Malkovich and Billy Bob Thornton. Could capturing a crime on camera be a couple's ticket out of Cut Bank? Escaping a small town can be murder...

programme.title: Jack Hunter And The Star Of Heaven
programme.desc: (2008) Action starring Ivan Sergei. When archaeologist Jack Hunter's mentor is killed, he must find the culprit and stop ancient treasure falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: The People's Vet
programme.desc: Meet the dedicated teams of vets and nurses who provide the essential care and treatment needed by their furry patients at two of the UK's busiest Charity pet hospitals.

programme.title: The People's Vet
programme.desc: Meet the dedicated teams of vets and nurses who provide the essential care and treatment needed by their furry patients at two of the UK's busiest Charity pet hospitals.

programme.title: Voice from the Stone
programme.desc: Set in 1950s Tuscany, Voice from the Stone is the haunting and suspenseful story of Verena, a solemn nurse drawn to aid a young boy who has fallen silent since the sudden passing of his mother.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A young cop (Channing Tatum) is assigned to a precinct in the working class neighborhood where he grew up, where an old secret threatens to destroy his family.

programme.title: The Open Road
programme.desc: Upon learning of his mother's sudden heart condition, Carlton Garrett is faced with the challenge of fulfilling her dire wish to bring his estranged father to the hospital before the operation.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A successful lawyer's husband is arrested for murdering nine villagers in El Salvador in 1988, as a US soldier under a different name. She decides to defend him in military court and find out the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Brimstone & Treacle
programme.desc: A mysterious young man, claiming to be a family friend, infiltrates a couple's home to execute malevolent intentions.

programme.title: Francesco
programme.desc: حياة القديس فرنسيس الأسيزي من ابن رجل ثري إلى إنسانية دينية.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Three young women vacationing in Paris, find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love. A businessman bets his life on a horse race a gangster sees the future a pop star falls prey to a crime boss.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four buddies share a wild night of drinking in a ski resort hot tub and wake up with hangovers in 1986! Now, they'll need the help of a one-armed bellhop and a hot tub repairman to survive the crazy 80's, but it may change their future forever!

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
programme.desc: One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city.

programme.title: Perks Of Being A Wall Flower
programme.desc: Charlie is guided through a journey of self discovery by free spirit Sam and her wild stepbrother Patrick.

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: The timeless love story reimagined for a new generation of fans.

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: The timeless love story reimagined for a new generation of fans.

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: A pianist and an actress fall in love in Los Angeles while attempting to reconcile their aspirations.

programme.title: Perks Of Being A Wall Flower
programme.desc: Charlie is guided through a journey of self discovery by free spirit Sam and her wild stepbrother Patrick.

programme.title: Elf Man
programme.desc: An Elf is left behind by Santa to help rescue the Harper family from a lousy Christmas. The Elf and the family get more than they bargained for, as the kids help the Elf discover his special powers and true identity as a budding superhero.

programme.title: A Christmas Dream
programme.desc: Headstrong New Yorker, Ashley, reluctantly agrees to spend Christmas in Italy with her mother in an effort to sell her grandparents' ranch. However, over time she finds herself growing attached to the beautiful countryside, and upon meeting one of the potential investors, realises that love and legacy could bring the old family home together again.

programme.title: 3 Day Christmas
programme.desc: Martin Taylor has totally lost touch with his family. He has no clue who his teenage daughter's friends are, why his son only communicates with an electronic sign outside his bedroom door, or why his youngest child watches so much TV. Convinced the family needs to reconnect, Martin surprises the wife and kids with a little experiment-he locks them in their own home with no power, no heat, no running water, and absolutely no contact with the world outside! The sudden holiday staycation isn't what the Taylors had in mind for Christmas, but they'll have to team up to prove they can survive Dad's wacky mission and their wackier relatives. With a little planning and a whole lot of love, this just might turn into the best Taylor family Christmas yet!

programme.title: The Magic Reindeer: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Niko the Reindeer enjoys his cool and carefree life in the Arctic, but that all changes when he is given his most surprising Christmas present ever - a little stepbrother named Jonni! Niko is unhappy about this new addition to the family, but when Jonni is kidnapped by eagles, Niko realises that it's down to him to fly off and rescue his brother!

programme.title: Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Recently widowed, Julia (Olivia Newton-John) is left to raise two young girls on her own, and when she loses her job, things go from bad to worse as she struggles to pay her bills. Then, arriving at her idyllic mountain home, city banker Brian Harding (Gregory Harrison) is tasked to deliver some devastating news - she'll need to hand over the property after Christmas. However, an unlikely relationship begins when Brian crashes his car nearby, and Julia graciously offers for him to stay with her over the holidays while he heals up and waits out the snowstorm. Eventually won over by the love and determination of the small family, might Brian find a way to bring them a Christmas miracle?

programme.title: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: After surviving and killing her serial killer boyfriend, a young woman rebuilds her life with a new job at an all-night gas station. Haunted by visions of her boyfriend's crimes and delusions of his imminent return, what seems like a routine night becomes one of mayhem and murder. As the bodies start to pile up, will she survive the night?

programme.title: The Farm
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. A brutal, gore-tastic slasher/survival horror, in the vein of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre and Wolf Creek. While on a road trip a couple decide to stop at a diner. Little do they know that ordering a hamburger will have terrible consequences. Their journey soon becomes a harrowing story of survival as they are kidnapped by local farmers. On their farm, humans are the main dish.

programme.title: Open Grave
programme.desc: This twisted thriller will keep you guessing until the bitter end. Waking up in a pit of dead bodies with no memory, a man joins forces with a group of strangers. Together they must figure out who is behind the mysterious mass killings. But suspicions give way to violence, as they piece together their identities and discover a much more vicious and deadly threat to their survival.

programme.title: Midnight Man
programme.desc: On a snowy night in her grandmothers sprawling mansion, teenage Alex and her best friend Miles discover a mysterious box hidden away in the attic. Inside are instructions for The Midnight Game, an ancient Pagan ritual said to summon the players greatest fears. It all seems like harmless fununtil they unleash the terrifying spirit of The Midnight Man, an unholy force who pits them against their darkest demons and dares them to survive.

programme.title: Barefoot
programme.desc: A charming and endearing romantic comedy starring Evan Rachel Wood and Scott Speedman. The "black sheep" son of a wealthy family meets a free-spirited, but sheltered woman. To convince his family that he's finally straightened out his life, he takes her home for his brother's wedding where an improbable romance blooms, as she impresses everyone with her genuine, simple charms.

programme.title: A Perfect Match
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Emily Alatalo. A woman tests her company's new dating app and matches with her complete opposite. Will it be a dating disaster or can opposites really attract?

programme.title: All Yours
programme.desc: Cass is a single mother and high-powered lawyer who hires a handsome family friend as a nanny. But will Cass ultimately take a chance on love? Nicollette Sheridan and Dan Payne star. (2016)

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: (2021) Romantic comedy starring Autumn Reeser. A workaholic wellness mogul goes on a retreat in Montana, where she discovers that slowing down might just be the key to finding inner peace - and love.

programme.title: Romantic Rewrite
programme.desc: Ivy is a romance editor and Reed is a mystery writer who can't stand each other. As faith has it, they both happen to be staying at the same vacation spot, what could go wrong? (2022)

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image consultant Rebecca must clean up an arrogant ex-soccer players image. Will Rebecca be able to raise to the challenge to help Clive become the best version of himself? (2022)

programme.title: Save the Date
programme.desc: Lizzy Caplan and Alison Brie star in a romantic comedy about 2 very different sisters, and their adventures in love, lust and a race to the altar.

programme.title: Date & Switch
programme.desc: High school seniors Michael and Matty have been best friends since 3rd grade. Still virgins, they make a pact to help each other "score" before Senior Prom. But their mission takes an unexpected turn when Matty announces that he's gay.

programme.title: Still Today
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Pete's groomsman give him a wedding gift he'll never forget. An escort. Maybe it's the Lunar Eclipse, maybe it's fate, but after a magical night in the city maybe this girl is what Pete needed all along.

programme.title: Romance in the Wilds
programme.desc: Amid a deadly wildfire, an unexpected romance ignites between a forest ranger and a geologist as they race to escape the flames.

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: A Christmas Village
programme.desc: To save her reputation, Piper Jensen, a public relations genius and owner of her own PR company, agrees to work for the owner of a failing Santa's Village and discovers love and how magical Christmas is after all.

programme.title: A Christmas to Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett is a chef but every year her holiday dishes never sell. So this year, her best friend buys her a ticket for a holiday...maybe she will find love in a handsome rival chef from her past, and regain the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: The Gift Of Christmas
programme.desc: Christmastime at the home of George and Denise Barnett look festive, but all is not well - George is worried about a friend and Denise over the Christmas concert at their church. Solutions don't come easily but on Christmas Eve everyone is reminded of the true gift of Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas Catch
programme.desc: Detective Bennett is on the trail of a thief and goes undercover to find where he's hiding the loot. While undercover, she falls for the supposed thief and begins to suspect that he's been framed. Was he framed? Or are feelings clouding her judgment?

programme.title: Christmas At The Holly Hotel
programme.desc: Kathy, a food critic in New York City, returns home for Christmas at the request of her parents. There she meets a handsome police officer, which now complicates her situation.

programme.title: A Horse Called Hope
programme.desc: A strong-willed but moody teenager Lizzy is sent to live on her grandmother's ranch after an incident at school gets her suspended. Although reticent at first, Lizzy finally starts to unwind with the help of a nameless pony whom she calls Hope. When Lizzy learns the unfortunate news that the ranch is about to be foreclosed she devises a plan that will not only save her grandmother's property but also help Hope in the process.

programme.title: Destined At Christmas
programme.desc: Two people meet on Black Friday, get separated, and yearn to reunite—if only they knew each other's last names and numbers. Can destiny help them find each other by Christmas?

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: Snowed Inn Christmas
programme.desc: Jenna Hudson and Kevin Jenner are polar opposites.

programme.title: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Billy & Maire near 9-year marriage end: Romantic artist and businesswoman.

programme.title: The Christmas Trap
programme.desc: Couple on brink of divorce stuck in elevator on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her standards, but Helena's fiancé's sister smells danger.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki discovers that her client is actually a Voodoo priestess intent on resurrecting her dead brother.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Cheer for Your Life
programme.desc: A high schooler faces a brutal cheer initiation. When things turn deadly and she disappears, her mom must act.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: The story of two conmen who go on a road trip to malls dressed as Santa and his elf. Rather than spreading good cheer, the duo's motive is to rob each establishment, a strategy that becomes complicated when they encounter an 8-year-old who teaches them the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: The story of two conmen who go on a road trip to malls dressed as Santa and his elf. Rather than spreading good cheer, the duo's motive is to rob each establishment, a strategy that becomes complicated when they encounter an 8-year-old who teaches them the true meaning of Christmas.

Steven Spielberg directs this riotous farce depicting the hysteria of a cross section of Los Angeles citizens following the bombing of Pear Harbor. The film is loosely based on a true event in which a Japanese submarine surfaced off the California coast, setting off a brief wave of panic.

programme.title: The Producers
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck producer and his accountant hit on a get-rich-quick scheme that backfires when their sure-fire flop becomes a hit.

programme.title: Madron
programme.desc: A nun, the only survivor of an Indian massacre of a wagon train, is taken in by a cantankerous old gunfighter.

programme.title: $100,000 for Ringo
programme.desc: Stranger Lee Barton rides into Rainbow Valley, mistaken for a man thought dead. As tensions rise with ruthless town boss Tom Cherry—who's after hidden gold and the affections of a local woman—Barton is drawn into violence and revenge. With a sheriff's help, he seeks justice and a new start with a boy who believes he's his father.

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 31, 32, 33
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP36-38
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: The Ghost Goes West
programme.desc: Robert Donat plays two roles in this celebrated comedy.

programme.title: Personal Affair
programme.desc: When a teenaged student disappears, her teacher is suspected of killing her.

programme.title: Laughter in Paradise
programme.desc: When the last will and testament of wealthy, notorious practical joker Henry Augustus Russell is read to his only surviving relatives, it is found that he had remained faithful to his reputation until his last hours. Each of his four relatives will receive a fortune, provided they perform required hilarious, embarrassing or criminal acts.

programme.title: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Benjamin Stubbins is a penniless lawyer who has spent most of his money on drink. When he accidentally interrupts a robbery at work, he becomes the target of a gang of thieves who determine that although he is impoverished, his relatives aren't.

programme.title: The Ghost Train (1941)
programme.desc: When the ghost train appears, passengers are drawn into a mysterious web of crime.

programme.title: The Fox Family
programme.desc: A story of a family who are kumiho(nine-tailed) foxes in human form. They are looking for a chance to eat a fresh human liver to be turned back into humans.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

programme.title: Springtime
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: The Last Princess
programme.desc: A Joseon princess sent to Japan Deok-hye's life is consumed by love loss and her brother's defection plans.

programme.title: Cabriolet
programme.desc: Burnt out Jia seeks freedom on a road trip where she encounters a mysterious country man Byeong-jae.

programme.title: SAMJIN COMPANY ENGLISH CLASS
programme.desc: Three female office workers take English classes for promotions and team up to expose company corruption.

programme.title: Revolt
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, a U.S. Special Forces soldier known only as ‘Bo' (Lee Pace) wakes up in a prison cell in Nairobi with no idea how he got there or indeed who he is.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage stars in KNOWING, a gripping action-thriller of global proportions about a professor who stumbles on terrifying predictions about the future and sets out to prevent them from coming true. Rose Byrne and Lara Robinson also star in director Alex Proyas' riveting feature.

programme.title: Duplicate
programme.desc: Duplicate' is a twisty, mind-bending Freudian-fuelled science fiction story about a man who shares his body with his twin brother, stabilised by an experimental deep-brain stimulation device.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: Christmas by The Book
programme.desc: A bestselling writer is dispatched by a TV talk show to a rural town where she is given two weeks to re-create the magical childhood Christmas described in her book. Starring Lindy Booth (2022)

programme.title: Her Magical Christmas
programme.desc: (2017) Seasonal drama with Jessica Lowndes. Heartbroken at Christmas, a woman loses her sparkle until magical ornaments sent by her mother help bring her hope, courage and maybe a touch of new love.

programme.title: Christmas Makeover
programme.desc: (2018) Yuletide fun with Lily Anne Harrison. An advertising executive is sent to a Christmas 'bootcamp' to get her into the festive spirit before trying to land a big client with traditional values.

programme.title: Christmas Confessions
programme.desc: (2015) Romance with Sarah Lancaster. When an out-of-work actress returns to her hometown for Christmas after a decade away, she finds love and friendship. Will she see what's truly important in life?

programme.title: Christmas On Holly Lane
programme.desc: (2018) Feel-good drama with Sarah Lancaster. Three lifelong friends reunite in a house filled with years of memories and make a plan to save the place that was so special to them through childhood.

programme.title: See for Me
programme.desc: See For Me is an original, edge-of-your-seat home invasion thriller with a killer twist.

programme.title: No Man Of God
programme.desc: Bill Hagmaier, an agent in the FBI's Behavioural Analysis Unit, is assigned to probe the dangerous mind of convicted serial killer Ted Bundy prior to his execution.

programme.title: Bad Investigate
programme.desc: Romeu, a corrupt cop, hires the services of Cid and Alex, to catch a notorious criminal, who left Mexico and is on his way to Galicia, Spain to find the killer of his brother, also trying to catch the same criminal is an FBI agent.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: The Shepherd (2008)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this hard-hitting action thriller about a border patrol agent who attempts to take down a rogue American Special Forces unit that's smuggling Afghan heroin into the United States.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Kings Of South Beach
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a Miami Beach nightclub owner who takes a young employee under his wing, while trying to avoid bankruptcy and the mafia.

programme.title: Chill Factor
programme.desc: A new biological chemical weapon that explodes up to temperatures over fifty degrees Fahrenheit, falls into the hands of two men who try to make sure that it doesn't get stolen by a terrorist.

programme.title: Fireflies in the Garden
programme.desc: The Taylor family is devastated by an accident that takes place on the day their matriarch is due to graduate from college.

programme.title: The Assistant
programme.desc: An assistant to a powerful movie mogul grows increasingly aware of the questionable behaviour of her boss toward her female peers.

programme.title: 5 Days of War (5 Days of August)
programme.desc: In August 2008, amid the war between Russia and Georgia in South Ossetia American reporter Thomas Anders (Rupert Friend, The Young Victoria) and his cameraman (Richard Coyle, Prince of Persia: Sands of Time) try to document the escalating conflict.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Centuries ago, the mighty warrior Kaulder (Vin Diesel) vanquished the all-powerful Witch Queen, but in the moments before his death he was cursed with immortality.

programme.title: Windtalkers

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: Elektra
